topic: Noah's Ark and the Great Flood

script.title: Noah's Ark and the Great Flood 🌈 | Bible Story for Kids

scenes.narration: Long ago, the world was full of people who had forgotten God. But there was one good man named Noah, who loved God with all his heart.
scenes.image_prompt: Colorful children's storybook illustration of Noah, a kind bearded man in simple robes, standing on a hillside at sunrise, looking up at a bright sky, warm and cheerful style, bright colors, family-friendly

scenes.narration: One day, God spoke to Noah. He said, 'Build a giant boat called an ark. A great flood is coming, but I will keep you safe!'
scenes.image_prompt: Cheerful storybook illustration of Noah kneeling with hands clasped in prayer, golden light from heaven shining down on him, peaceful meadow background, warm bright colors, children's book style

scenes.narration: Noah obeyed God right away. He worked hard with his family, hammering and sawing, building the biggest boat anyone had ever seen.
scenes.image_prompt: Colorful illustration of Noah and his three sons building a massive wooden ark, hammers and tools in hand, sawdust flying, smiling faces, bright sunny day, cheerful children's book style

scenes.narration: Then something amazing happened! Animals began to come, two by two. Lions, elephants, giraffes, and tiny mice, all walking together into the ark.
scenes.image_prompt: Joyful storybook illustration of pairs of animals (lions, elephants, giraffes, zebras, mice, birds) walking in a line toward a giant wooden ark, rainbow sky, colorful grass and flowers, children's book style

scenes.narration: When everyone was safely inside, the rain began to fall. It rained and rained for forty days and forty nights. But Noah trusted God.
scenes.image_prompt: Cheerful yet wonder-filled illustration of a large wooden ark floating on stormy waters, gentle rain falling, animals peeking through ark windows, soft blue and grey tones with warm golden light inside the ark, children's book style

scenes.narration: Inside the ark, Noah cared for all the animals. You can imagine how noisy it was! But God was watching over them every single day.
scenes.image_prompt: Warm interior scene of Noah feeding animals inside the ark, happy lions, elephants, monkeys, and birds, wooden beams, lantern light, cozy atmosphere, children's book illustration style

scenes.narration: Finally, the rain stopped. Noah sent out a dove, and it came back with a little olive leaf. Dry land was near at last!
scenes.image_prompt: Bright illustration of Noah standing at the ark window, holding out his hand as a white dove carrying a green olive branch flies toward him, blue sky breaking through clouds, peaceful and hopeful, children's book style

scenes.narration: When they stepped onto dry land, God painted a beautiful rainbow in the sky. It was His promise to always love and protect His children. You are loved too!
scenes.image_prompt: Glorious colorful rainbow arching over Mount Ararat, Noah's family and animals stepping out of the ark onto green grass, flowers blooming, bright sunshine, joyful celebration, cheerful children's storybook illustration
